title: thymus serpyllum subsp. dacicus
intro: Thymus serpyllum subsp. dacicus is a subspecies of the wild thyme plant, a low-growing, flowering herb native to the Balkan Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum subsp. dacicus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health issues.
